infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TzCRVS needs camera access so officers can capture the citizen's photo during NIN registration.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TzCRVS needs photo library access so officers can select a citizen photo if the camera is unavailable.

plugins.cameraPermission: TzCRVS needs camera access so officers can capture the citizen's photo during NIN registration.
plugins.photosPermission: TzCRVS needs photo library access so officers can select a citizen photo if the camera is unavailable.
